text: No person may operate a farm labor vehicle on a highway unless both headlamps required under Section 24400 are lighted, regardless of the time of day.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 13. TOWING AND LOADING EQUIPMENT [29000 - 31560]
### Chapter 5. Transporting Other Loads [31301 - 31560]
#### Article 2. Vehicles Transporting Workmen [31400 - 31409]
##### § 31408

No person may operate a farm labor vehicle on a highway unless both headlamps required under Section 24400 are lighted, regardless of the time of day.

*(Added by Stats. 1999, Ch. 556, Sec. 5. Effective September 29, 1999.)*
